use_cases: Users input queries to interact with an AI assistant for answers and explanations
Toggle research modes (search, deep research, reasoning) to customize AI responses
Upload documents for AI analysis and context-aware responses
Select from categorized command suggestions (learn, code, write) for quick prompts
Engage with a visually animated chat interface on web and mobile platforms
ai_summary: A comprehensive AI chat input interface featuring a text input field with toggleable research modes (search, deep research, reasoning), file upload capability with animation, and categorized command suggestions for learn, code, and write tasks. Built with framer-motion animations and lucide-react icons for a modern, interactive user experience across desktop and mobile platforms.
